pending_consolidation.content: Creatures 1/2 AI research revealed chemical substrate model (drives as decaying numerics with half-lives) as core applicable pattern — implemented as lobotto_state.json
First time we expanded AI architecture using neuroscience research (DEFCON 1 mode). Pattern: deep bio research → direct code implementation of principles.
Defender Add-MpPreference command failed with multiple -ExclusionPath flags on same call. Must run as separate calls. Correction received and fixed.

meta.note: Hippocampus analog — fast-learning short-term episodic buffer. Dreaming engine promotes high-salience items to long-term files (heuristics, case_studies, about_priscilla). Items marked consolidated=true after promotion. Purge consolidated items after 30 days.
